title: CBP Agents Kill VA Nurse Alex Pretti During Minneapolis Protest
excerpt: Two Customs and Border Protection agents fatally shot 37-year-old ICU nurse and U.S. citizen Alex Pretti in Minneapolis. Multiple verified videos appear to contradict the DHS account that Pretti brandished his firearm; footage shows an agent removing the gun from Pretti's holster before shots were fired.
content:
On January 24, 2026, CBP Border Patrol Agent Jesus Ochoa and CBP Officer Raymundo Gutierrez fatally shot Alex Jeffrey Pretti, a 37-year-old VA intensive care nurse and U.S. citizen, near the intersection of Nicollet Avenue and 26th Street in Minneapolis. Pretti, who had a valid Minnesota permit to carry and no criminal record, was filming agents with his phone and had intervened to shield a woman who had been shoved by a federal officer.

Video verified by Reuters, ABC News, the BBC, the Wall Street Journal, and the Associated Press appears to show an agent removing Pretti's gun from his holster and moving away from Pretti before shots were fired. DHS Secretary Noem claimed Pretti had arrived "to inflict maximum damage" and kill law enforcement — a characterization his family, witnesses, and a former DHS undersecretary publicly contradicted. A preliminary CBP report sent to Congress did not mention Pretti reaching for his firearm. Federal investigators had no documented chain of custody for Pretti's handgun, which was placed on a vehicle seat rather than in a required evidence bag.

  • Ten shots were fired in less than five seconds, according to forensic audio analysis
  • The DOJ Civil Rights Division opened an investigation into Pretti's killing; no comparable investigation was opened for the January 7 killing of Renee Good
  • CBP placed both agents on administrative leave
  • Minnesota governor activated the National Guard following the shooting
  • The Hennepin County Attorney's Office and Minnesota BCA filed a lawsuit to prevent evidence tampering after state investigators were denied access to the crime scene
mediaPlaceholder: Verified bystander video showing the sequence of events leading to Alex Pretti's shooting by federal agents
